name: mansion-grand-hall
summary: The entrance hall of a noble's manor. Statement room: tall chandelier, stair to the upper floor, banners or portraits, polished floor. Designed to intimidate guests.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: 2:1 elongated — the hall is a processional space

accent.purpose: ceremonial carpet from entrance to stair

primary_palette.note: the architectural centerpiece — stair ascending from the hall
centerpiece of ceiling, pillars framing below
family-founder effigy, flanked by lesser busts

story_prompts: awaiting a ball — flowers fresh, chandelier candles just lit
family in mourning — black cloth over portraits, silence
faded glory — dust on the bust plinths, one chandelier candle out of three working
under new ownership — old heraldry removed, new banners not yet hung
anti_patterns: never use plain dungeon-stone texture — marble or polished tile only
central floor stays clear — this is a processional space, not a furnished parlor
symmetry is non-negotiable — paired pillars, paired candelabras, paired portraits
